title: T-045 — ncr_create_modal (parity, multi-path form)
prompt:
# T-045 — ncr_create_modal (parity)

PRD: docs/prd/09-QUALITY-PRD.md §11.4 V-QA-NCR-003/004, §5.3 signature evidence, §8.5 traceability
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/quality/modals.jsx:300-382 (ncr_create_modal)

## Goal
Multi-path NCR creation modal with conditional yield_issue / allergen_deviation blocks, save-draft + submit Server Action calls (T-038), 1:1 parity vs prototype.

## Implementation contract
1. packages/ui/src/quality/NcrCreateModal.tsx (Client Component) wrapping shadcn Dialog with useForm + zodResolver + useWatch on type field for conditional FormSections.
2. Wide variant Dialog (max-width override on DialogContent per translation-notes M-06).
3. Conditional yield_issue block: targetYield/actualYield/claim_pct number inputs; client-computed claim_value preview but server recomputes on submit.
4. Conditional allergen_deviation block: allergenLink Combobox FK-validated server-side.
5. Two Server Action calls: saveNcrDraft and submitNcr (T-038); submitNcr enforces description.length>=20 server-side; client preview validation only.
6. severity is auto-derived from rule severity_map or fail_reason_code server-side; client Select is a display preview (read-only after server response).
7. Wired into ncr_list (T-043) Create NCR CTA via ?modal=create URL state.

## Prototype parity
Anchor: `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/quality/modals.jsx:300-382` (ncr_create_modal).
Parity checklist (verify all):
- Wide Dialog
- type Select drives conditional sections (quality / yield_issue / allergen_deviation / supplier / process)
- yield_issue block: targetYield/actualYield/claim_pct inputs + claimValue preview
- allergen_deviation block: allergenLink Combobox
- Save as draft + Submit NCR buttons (two distinct Server Actions)
- dueMap severity→hours displayed inline (severity-driven response_due_at preview)
- Mandatory min length 20 description (server-enforced; client preview)

## Files
- packages/ui/src/quality/NcrCreateModal.tsx [create]
- packages/ui/src/quality/__tests__/NcrCreateModal.test.tsx [create]
- apps/web/src/app/quality/ncr/page.tsx [modify]

## Acceptance criteria (Given-When-Then)
1. Compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/quality/modals.jsx:300-382 — parity on structure (Dialog wide + dual conditional blocks + Save/Submit), visuals (shadcn Form+Input+Select+Textarea+Combobox+Alert+Button only), interaction (useWatch drives conditional sections, two distinct Server Actions, claim_value preview client + server recompute) — RTL + checklist
2. Given type='yield_issue' AND target_yield_pct empty, when Submit clicked, then Zod superRefine returns error on target_yield_pct field and Server Action is NOT called
3. Given type='allergen_deviation' AND allergenLink empty, when Submit clicked, then Zod superRefine returns error on allergenLink field and Server Action is NOT called; if allergenLink provided but invalid FK, then server-side rejects with V-QA-NCR-004
4. UI closeout includes screenshot/artifact evidence and Playwright trace/artifacts where applicable per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`; if Playwright is unavailable, document the blocker and provide RTL/snapshot fallback evidence.

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: NcrCreateModal.test.tsx asserting parity + yield/allergen cross-field validation + two-action wiring before implementation
- Run 'pnpm --filter ui test NcrCreateModal'
- For UI parity, capture screenshots/artifacts and Playwright trace/video/artifacts where applicable; attach artifact paths in closeout.

## Risk red lines
- Do not let client compute final severity or response_due — server authoritative (translation-notes-quality §M-06)
- Do not allow Submit without server-side description.length>=20
- Do not hardcode severity→hours map in UI — read from rule registry V-QA-NCR-001
- Do not skip allergenLink server FK validation

pipeline_inputs.description: Multi-path NCR creation modal with conditional yield_issue / allergen_deviation blocks + saveDraft + submitNcr Server Action calls + cross-field Zod validation. 1:1 parity vs prototype.
pipeline_inputs.details: Client Component wrapping shadcn Dialog (wide variant). useForm + zodResolver + useWatch('type') drives conditional sections. yield_issue block: targetYield/actualYield/claim_pct + client-side claim_value preview (server recomputes on submit). allergen_deviation block: allergenLink Combobox with debounced server FK validation. Two distinct Server Actions: saveNcrDraft (no validation) and submitNcr (description.length>=20 + V-QA-NCR-003 + V-QA-NCR-004 server-side). severity Select is server-driven preview only (read-only after server response). Wired into ncr_list CTA via ?modal=create URL searchParam. dueMap severity→hours displayed inline from rule registry V-QA-NCR-001 (not hardcoded). Translation-notes red-lines: useFieldArray not needed (single record); Combobox for product/assignedTo selects with debounced search; dual-action pattern (saveDraft/submit) is standard.
out_of_scope: Do not modify NCR Server Actions (T-038 owns)
Do not implement ncr_detail (T-044) or ncr_close_modal (T-046)
acceptance_criteria: Given the NCR create modal renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/quality/modals.jsx:300-382 (ncr_create_modal), then it matches on structural parity (wide Dialog + type Select + conditional yield_issue/allergen_deviation blocks + Save-draft & Submit buttons), visual parity (shadcn Form/Input/Select/Textarea/Combobox/Alert/Button only), interaction parity (useWatch drives conditional sections, two distinct Server Actions, claim_value preview client + server recompute) — verified by RTL render plus parity checklist
Given type='yield_issue' AND target_yield_pct empty, when Submit is clicked, then Zod returns error on target_yield_pct and Server Action is NOT invoked

Given type='allergen_deviation' with empty allergenLink, when Submit is clicked, then Zod returns error on allergenLink; with provided but invalid FK, server-side rejects with V-QA-NCR-004 and the row is not created

UI closeout includes screenshot/artifact evidence and Playwright trace/artifacts where applicable per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`; if Playwright is unavailable, document the blocker and provide RTL/snapshot fallback evidence.
test_strategy: RED: NcrCreateModal.test.tsx asserting parity + cross-field validation + two-action wiring + severity-display readonly before implementation
For UI parity, capture screenshots/artifacts and Playwright trace/video/artifacts where applicable; attach artifact paths in closeout.
risk_red_lines: Do not let client compute final severity or response_due — server authoritative (translation-notes §M-06)
Do not allow Submit without server-enforced description.length>=20
Do not hardcode severity→hours dueMap in UI — read from rule registry V-QA-NCR-001
Do not skip allergenLink server FK validation (V-QA-NCR-004)
